note: Static, human-curated catalog. Updated manually in the same PR that adds/removes a SKILL.md. No runtime synthesis; no auto-rebuild.

ported_with_delta.name: guardrail-validation
ported_with_delta.delta: extended 28-check catalog to G01-G103 (adds marker guardrails G96-G103)

sdk_native.name: mcp-knowledge-graph
sdk_native.note: Canonical read/write + fallback pattern for MCP-aware agents (neo4j-memory). Pipeline never halts on MCP failure; JSONL fallback preserved per CLAUDE.md rule 31.

sdk_native.name: python-asyncio-patterns
sdk_native.note: Python pack — TaskGroup-default structured concurrency, cancellation safety, async context manager pattern for clients. Authored in v0.5.0 Phase B.

sdk_native.name: python-pytest-patterns
sdk_native.note: Python pack — pytest fundamentals; cited from sdk-convention-devil-python C-14.

sdk_native.name: python-sdk-config-pattern
sdk_native.note: Python pack analog of go-sdk-config-struct-pattern — frozen @dataclass primary, pydantic optional. Cited from conventions.yaml parameter_count rule.

sdk_native.name: python-exception-patterns
sdk_native.note: Python pack analog of go-error-handling-patterns — MotadataError base hierarchy, raise X from y, except* (PEP 654).

sdk_native.name: python-mypy-strict-typing
sdk_native.note: Python pack — full annotations, X | None over Optional, Self, Protocol over ABC, py.typed marker, PEP 695 type-parameter syntax. Cited from sdk-convention-devil-python C-3, C-6 and sdk-packaging-devil-python P-6.

sdk_native.name: python-doctest-patterns
sdk_native.note: Python pack — Google-style Examples block, doctest +SKIP/+ELLIPSIS/+NORMALIZE_WHITESPACE flags, pytest --doctest-modules + --doctest-glob wiring. Cited from sdk-convention-devil-python C-11 and documentation-agent-python.

sdk_native.name: python-otel-instrumentation
sdk_native.note: Python pack — module-scope tracer/meter, start_as_current_span, OTel semconv keys, record_exception + set_status, async context propagation. Cited from sdk-convention-devil-python C-7.

sdk_native.name: python-asyncio-leak-prevention
sdk_native.note: Python pack — leak categories L-A through L-E, asyncio_task_tracker + unclosed_session_tracker fixtures, pytest-repeat amplification, tracemalloc snapshot diff. Cited from sdk-asyncio-leak-hunter-python.

sdk_native.name: python-client-shutdown-lifecycle
sdk_native.note: Python pack — async with primary, aclose() fallback, _closed flag idempotency, ordered teardown, bounded drain via asyncio.timeout. Cited from sdk-convention-devil-python C-5.

sdk_native.name: python-dependency-vetting
sdk_native.note: Python pack — V-1 through V-11 per-dep checks (license/pip-audit/safety/size/age/transitives/PyPI adoption/maintenance/Sigstore/typosquat/native-code). Drives sdk-dep-vet-devil-python verdicts.

sdk_native.name: python-mock-strategy
sdk_native.note: Python pack — Fake-first vs Mock(spec=); respx for HTTP; freezegun for time; pytest-mock mocker fixture; never patch internal symbols.

sdk_native.name: python-testcontainers-setup
sdk_native.note: Python pack — testcontainers-python session-scoped fixtures for Postgres/Redis/Kafka/MinIO/NATS/Mongo; @pytest.mark.integration; Docker availability gate; log capture on failure.

sdk_native.name: python-circuit-breaker-policy
sdk_native.note: Python pack — purgatory async circuit breaker; per-endpoint scope; CircuitOpenError wraps OpenedState; OTel state-transition counter.

sdk_native.name: python-backpressure-flow-control
sdk_native.note: Python pack — asyncio.Queue(maxsize) + worker pool; submit (block) vs submit_or_drop (drop); BackpressureError; queue-depth observable + drop counter.

sdk_native.name: python-client-rate-limiting
sdk_native.note: Python pack — aiolimiter leaky bucket; Retry-After honoring; AIMD adaptive shaping on 429; X-RateLimit-* proactive header parsing.

sdk_native.name: python-credential-provider-pattern
sdk_native.note: Python pack — async CredentialProvider Protocol; SecretStr redacting wrapper; Static/Env/File/CachedFile/OAuth providers; refresh-lock + double-check; never log secrets.

sdk_native.name: python-client-tls-configuration
sdk_native.note: Python pack — ssl.create_default_context() baseline + minimum_version pin; never check_hostname=False; layered custom CA; mTLS via load_cert_chain with password from CredentialProvider.

sdk_native.name: python-connection-pool-tuning
sdk_native.note: Python pack — aiohttp.TCPConnector + asyncpg.Pool + redis.ConnectionPool + httpx.Limits + aiokafka sizing; PoolExhaustedError; pool-depth observable; idle-lifetime recycle.

sdk_native.name: python-hexagonal-architecture
sdk_native.note: Python pack — src/<pkg>/{domain,ports,application,adapters}/ layers; pure-function domain; Protocol-typed ports; client.py composition root; import-linter enforcement.

sdk_native.name: python-hypothesis-patterns
sdk_native.note: Python pack — @given/@settings/@example/@reproduce_failure; st.composite + st.from_type; round-trip / idempotence / monotonic / bound property templates; RuleBasedStateMachine for state machines.
